title: André Rieu's 2022 Maastricht Concert: Happy Days Are Here Again!
original_title: André Rieu - Happy Days are Here Again!
overview: The wait is over! After two long years, Maestro André Rieu is performing again in his hometown of Maastricht! We are proud to present André's brand new summer concert - Happy Days are Here Again!

trailers.title: André Rieu & His Johann Strauss Orchestra / Happy days are here again / 3/17/22
